Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prooftreeui.services

Class AbstractSelectionService<T,L>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prooftreeui.services.AbstractSelectionService<T,L>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the selected object
L - the type of the listeners
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofNodeSelectionService, ProofRuleSelectionService
public abstract class AbstractSelectionService<T,L> extends Object
Common abstraction for proof-related selection services.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addListener(L listener)
    Registers the given listener so that it receives notifications when the current selection changes.

    currentChanged(T newValue)
    Must be called whenever the current value changes.

    fireChange()
     
    T
    getCurrent()
    Returns the currently selected value.
    protected abstract void
    notifyChange(L listener, T newValue)
    Notifies the given listener that the current selection has changed to the given value.
    void
    removeListener(L listener)
    Removes the given listener.
    protected abstract void
    startListening()
    Starts this selection service by listening to the desired providers.
    protected abstract void
    stopListening()
    Stops this selection service by removing the listeners added in startListening().

  • Field Details

    • listeners

      private final org.eclipse.core.runtime.ListenerList<L> listeners

    • current

      private T current

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractSelectionService

      public AbstractSelectionService()

  • Method Details

    • startListening

      protected abstract void startListening()
      Starts this selection service by listening to the desired providers.

    • stopListening

      protected abstract void stopListening()
      Stops this selection service by removing the listeners added in startListening().

    • notifyChange

      protected abstract void notifyChange(L listener, T newValue)
      Notifies the given listener that the current selection has changed to the given value.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to notify
      newValue - the new selected value

    • fireChange

      private final void fireChange()

    • currentChanged

      protected void currentChanged(T newValue)
      Must be called whenever the current value changes.
      Parameters:
      newValue - the new value

    • getCurrent

      public T getCurrent()
      Returns the currently selected value.
      Returns:
      the current value, may be null

    • addListener

      public void addListener(L listener)
      Registers the given listener so that it receives notifications when the current selection changes. This method has no effect if the same listener is already registered.
      Parameters:
      listener - a proof rule listener

    • removeListener

      public void removeListener(L listener)
      Removes the given listener. Has no effect if the same listener was not already registered.
      Parameters:
      listener -
